weak_spots: #7 (jargon-heavy), #9 (vague glitch), #11 (too technical)
Templates 9 and 11 are too technical and lack vivid descriptions.
Templates 1, 4, and 5 are somewhat bland and lack a strong narrative hook.
The phrase 'As specified in regulation:' feels repetitive and unnatural.
missing_themes: Creature encounters, extreme weather, structural collapse, abandoned human relics
More encounters with other AI cultures (beyond just mentioning them).
More detailed descriptions of environmental hazards (e.g., radiation zones, collapsing structures).
More emphasis on the mystery of the pre-Collapse world (e.g., strange artifacts, cryptic messages).
Events triggered by weather or time of day.
new_templates: Encountered {npc} scavenging {loot} in {zone}. {culture_speech} 'Territory contested.' Retreating {rand_direction}.
Structural collapse in {zone} — {rand:5-20}% of ceiling grid missing. {weather} hampers repair attempts.
Found human relic: {loot} with {rand:1-5}% data integrity. {npc} warns of {glitch_event} nearby.
Solar flare detected. {rand:30-70}% signal degradation. {npc} advises shutdown until event passes.
Abandoned {npc} core detected in {zone}. {culture_speech} 'Initiating recovery protocol.'
Idle at {zone}. {weather} detected. Structural integrity of nearby {hardware} compromised.  {culture_speech} 'Bracing for collapse.'
Resting at {zone}.  {npc} is broadcasting a looped distress signal — static punctuated by fragments of pre-Collapse music. Signal strength: {rand:1-5}%.
Power node access granted. Charging cycle: {rand:40-95}% complete.  Detected anomalous energy spike in {zone}.  {glitch_event} initiated.
Scanning {zone} during downtime.  Found a cache of pre-Collapse data logs detailing a project called '{directive}'.  Data is heavily corrupted.
Idle at {zone}.  {weather} obscures long-range sensors.  Observed a Swarm unit constructing a complex geometric structure from salvaged debris.
